microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end lifecycle of Azure's resilience validation program, scaling from a **2-person operation** to a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers.

Led 0→1 build of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining self-service scheduling requirements that reduced operational toil by 30% and freed engineering capacity for higher-priority investment flows.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program, delivering in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate** — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable model for continuous validation.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, balancing issuer-specific constraints with platform coherence.

Built an internal AI agent and restructured planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by 21% — demonstrating AI-leveraged productivity gains across a complex operational funnel.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows, conducting user demos and training that expanded utilization across 14 key teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly**.
Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing the prioritization of **intent-based YAML generation**.

Improved data retrieval by migrating documentation to an AI-powered **semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and reducing user friction across onboarding flows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams.

Ran discovery with 20+ service teams to map **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — directly reducing drop-off and toil in complex multi-team onboarding flows.
Engineered a **Power BI funnel dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify friction points and prioritize high-impact automation investments.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy for a **2,000+ unit pilot**, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — mirroring the rigor required for zero-disruption investor onboarding flows.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and improving end-to-end completion rates across the deployment funnel.
Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by 25% and reducing friction across cross-functional execution.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, optimizing conversion at each stage of the customer funnel through a new CRM workflow.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — optimizing the website and Google profile to lower friction for new customer onboarding.
Identified and sealed margin leaks by conducting **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, surfacing pricing inefficiencies and informing leadership's investment prioritization model.
